title: plantago cornuti
intro: Plantago cornuti is a species of flowering plant in the plantain family, characterized by its flat, lance-shaped leaves and small, greenish-brown flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Plantago cornuti include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and congestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Plantago cornuti often involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
